vllm.title: [Kernel] Turn off CUTLASS scaled_mm for Ada Lovelace
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We haven't tuned the cutlass kernels for SM89 and performance is very bad.
The following benchmarks were run on an L40 with
    python benchmarks/benchmark_serving.py \
    --backend openai \
    --model neuralmagic/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct-FP8 \
    --dataset-path ShareGPT_V3_unfiltered_cleaned_spl

vllm.title: [ Misc ] Enable Quantizing All Layers of DeekSeekv2
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

Deepseek has a layer self_attn.kv_a_proj_with_mqa, which uses ReplicatedLinear, which uses the default weight_loaded, but this layer can be quantized to fp8
This fix handles loading weight scales (which do not have a shape in autofp8 unfortunately) on this pathway

ACCURACY:

nm-testing/De

vllm.title: [Doc] xpu backend requires running setvars.sh
vllm.author: rscohn2
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
IPEX depends on MKL, and you need to do setvars.sh to setup the LD_LIBRARY_PATH to find it. It works fine with with setvars.sh and 2024.2 oneapi.
@jikunshang: Thanks for adding XPU support!
Here is the error message:
(.venv) rscohn1@gkdse-dnp-23:~/projects/cutlass/vllm$ python examples/offline_infer

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Cross python wheel
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

due to shift toward TORCH_LIBRARY from PYBIND, we can now build a single wheel for all python versions
updates build stage of dockerfile to use --py-limited-api=cp38
updated buildkite release workflow to avoid python matrix

vllm.title: [core][distributed] simplify code to support pipeline parallel
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
to minimize the line of code change for a model to support pipeline parallel.
in the model weight loading part, just add:
                if name not in params_dict:
                    # in pipeline parallelism, we may have layers that are not
                    # present on this rank
